mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO venue_seat_template (venue_id, section_id, seat_row, seat_number, seat_type) VALUES
(#{t.venueId}, #{t.sectionId}, #{t.seatRow}, #{t.seatNumber}, #{t.seatType})
mapper.select: SELECT vst.*, vs.section_name FROM venue_seat_template vst JOIN venue_section vs ON vst.section_id = vs.section_id WHERE vst.venue_id = #{venueId} ORDER BY vs.display_order, vst.seat_row, vst.seat_number
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM venue_seat_template WHERE venue_id = #{venueId}
